pages.title: Ember Seed
pages.text: A remnant of cinders, attrition, and accelerating aggression. The Seed rewards those who stay in the fight long enough to catch fire from the inside out.

pages.title: Dormant and Latent
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Grants fire resistance, burns melee attackers, and causes harmful effects on the bearer to wear off faster. Even asleep, the Seed answers suffering with heat.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): Its cleansing grows stronger and its retaliation steadier, turning it from a simple survival tool into a reliquary of contained flame.

pages.title: Awakened, Ascended, Transcendent, Apex
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): The Seed unlocks $(thing)Heat$(). Taking damage and dealing damage both build it, and each point of Heat adds offensive pressure.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): Heat grants more damage and stronger movement speed, turning drawn-out fights into momentum engines.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): When Heat climbs high enough, the Seed begins scorching nearby enemies automatically.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): The bearer becomes a furnace in motion. Heat grants the highest damage scaling, the strongest speed bonus, and a burst of Strength when fully stoked.
